shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-datepicker DatePicker monthsShown=2 renderCustomHeader changeMonth wrong panel most recently picked day" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "rg --files src | rg 'date|picker' && sed -n '240,520p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '520,1080p' src/calendar.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '380,470p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '620,715p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '930,980p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx && sed -n '360,430p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"setPreSelection\" src/index.tsx && sed -n '900,950p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '730,870p' src/index.tsx && git branch -a --no-color | head -40"
/bin/bash -lc "git remote -v && git log --all -S'monthSelectedIn: 0' --oneline -- src/index.tsx && sed -n '80,280p' src/index.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx -t "should render custom header month changes in the first month" --runInBand'
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx -t "should render custom header month changes in the first month" --runInBand --silent'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-datepicker-month-panel-navigation.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Reset multi-panel selection state on calendar navigation

When a multi-month date picker stores the panel index associated with the last day selection, month navigation must clear that index before rendering the new view. Navigation callbacks should own this reset, while day-selection callbacks continue to record the originating panel.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
